criterion_description: Three-month study covers all 32 current instruments.
Each Q-A/Q-B/Q-C profile contributes 63 trading days.
At least 3 initial engineering seeds per profile are present.
Later 10-seed expansion is tracked as a remaining validation gap.
Raw events, compact L2 states and feature datasets are inventoried.
acceptance_threshold: all three Phase 9 data products present

criterion_description: S01-S11 have proxy/control summaries over the three-month feature product.
S09-S11 are treated as controls/non-alpha or risk-only modules.
No Stage D row is strategy-promotion evidence.
